description: An arched mural painting showing a gathering of people in a dark forest setting. A woman in light blue sits elevated on what appears to be a log or stone, facing a group of listeners including men, women, and children. Some figures stand, others sit on the ground. To the right, figures in white and light clothing approach. The forest trees create a dark canopy above. The scene has an art nouveau quality with flowing lines and a decorative arched border with cross motifs. The overall atmosphere is one of enchantment and communal storytelling.
